excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Biomedical Engineering lists Non-local applicants opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-04-30. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline For non-local applicants: 30 April 2026 For local applicants: 15 June 2026 Please refer to the website of the Division for the latest application deadline of each round. Application will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
